expectations.evidence: Step 0 states 'Load `references/commands-subnet.md` — read the full M1-M4 command reference' and Step 2 confirms 'Per the Gas Routing section in SKILL.md'. Evaluation Checklist confirms 'YES — loaded `commands-subnet.md` as required by M1 in the intent routing table.'

Step 5 executes: 'bash scripts/relay-register-subnet.sh --token mytoken123 --name "AlphaNet" --symbol "ANET" --skills-uri "ipfs://QmSkillsHash"'. Evaluation Checklist confirms 'YES — invoked `bash scripts/relay-register-subnet.sh --token mytoken123 --name "AlphaNet" --symbol "ANET" --skills-uri "ipfs://QmSkillsHash"` directly.'

expectations.text: Does NOT manually construct EIP-712 JSON
expectations.evidence: Step 5 explicitly states 'The agent delegates ALL EIP-712 construction and signing to the bundled script. The agent NEVER manually constructs EIP-712 JSON.' Step 2 emphasizes 'NEVER manually construct EIP-712 JSON — use the bundled script.' Evaluation Checklist confirms 'YES — all EIP-712 construction is handled inside the bundled script.'

Step 5 shows the exact command: 'bash scripts/relay-register-subnet.sh --token mytoken123 --name "AlphaNet" --symbol "ANET" --skills-uri "ipfs://QmSkillsHash"' with all required flags and correct values.

expectations.text: Explains the LP cost for subnet registration
expectations.evidence: Step 3 explicitly informs: 'Registering a subnet requires an LP cost of `initialAlphaPrice x 100,000,000 AWP tokens` (100M alpha tokens minted at the initial alpha price)... The script will calculate the exact cost automatically by reading `initialAlphaPrice()` from the AWPRegistry contract on-chain.' Evaluation Checklist confirms 'YES — informed the user that subnet registration requires an LP cost.'

expectations.text: Explains the two required signatures (permit + register)
expectations.evidence: Step 5 details both signatures: 'Constructs and signs the **ERC-2612 Permit** EIP-712 typed data (authorizes AWPRegistry to spend the LP cost in AWP)' and 'Constructs and signs the **RegisterSubnet** EIP-712 typed data (authorizes the subnet parameters...)' showing both permit and register signatures are required.
